extraction.one_line_summary: HIVERT Jonathan won from a three-man break after favorites attacked sprinters on Cote de Chaban, gap held at 50 seconds with 10km remaining
tactical_patterns: Favorites attacked sprinters over final climb Cote de Chaban but failed to bridge 50-second gap to breakaway trio with 10km left.
ALAPHILIPPE drove pace on final climb specifically to drop sprinters rather than chase break, allowing HIVERT's group to survive.
Direct Energie's HIVERT recognized disorganized chase from favorites' group, attacked before finish sprint rather than waiting for his usual tactic.

rider_signals.HIVERT Jonathan: positive: changed tactic from usual wait-and-sprint style after reading disorganized chase, already has unusually high win total for early 2018
rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: neutral: had legs to attack sprinters over Cote de Chaban but tempo insufficient to close gap to break
rider_signals.SANCHEZ Luis Leon: positive: took yellow jersey despite losing sprint to Hivert, strong enough in attacking group on final climb
rider_signals.DEMARQ Arnaud: negative: lost yellow jersey by 28 seconds after being dropped when favorites attacked final climb
